title: Sore throat
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Defines Dubai telehealth scope and exclusions for emergency and controlled-medication prescribing.
red_flags.rationale: Reviewed to establish DHA telehealth scope and emergency exclusions; no content was mapped from scope alone.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines Dubai telehealth scope and exclusions for emergency and controlled-medication prescribing.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Pharyngitis/Tonsillitis (Sore Throat)

red_flags.text: Lists airway, swallowing, breathing, pain, immune compromise, neck stiffness, dehydration, and complication prompts for escalation.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped drooling, airway, breathing, neck, dehydration, severe-pain, and complication escalation fields.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists airway, swallowing, breathing, pain, immune compromise, neck stiffness, dehydration, and complication prompts for escalation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Pharyngitis/Tonsillitis (Sore Throat)

investigations.text: Lists swallowing pain, fever, cough and URTI features, tonsillar findings, cervical nodes, rash, and clinician-selected GAS testing context.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped sore-throat, swallowing, fever, respiratory, tonsillar, node, rash, temperature, and clinician-selected GAS-test fields.
investigations.evidence_extract: Lists swallowing pain, fever, cough and URTI features, tonsillar findings, cervical nodes, rash, and clinician-selected GAS testing context.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Pharyngitis/Tonsillitis (Sore Throat)

medication.text: Covers clinician-led symptom care, communication, treatment decisions, reassessment, and follow-up without authorising autonomous medication output.
medication.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-documented symptom care, medicine decisions, communication, reassessment, and follow-up without doses.
medication.evidence_extract: Covers clinician-led symptom care, communication, treatment decisions, reassessment, and follow-up without authorising autonomous medication output.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Pharyngitis/Tonsillitis (Sore Throat)

follow_up.text: Describes acute pharyngitis as commonly viral and self-limited while requiring systematic assessment for treatable or serious causes.
follow_up.rationale: Reviewed to establish the broad viral and bacterial acute-pharyngitis context; no diagnosis was inferred.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Describes acute pharyngitis as commonly viral and self-limited while requiring systematic assessment for treatable or serious causes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Pharyngitis/Tonsillitis (Sore Throat)

follow_up.text: States the adult and paediatric scope and expected recovery or reassessment context for viral and GAS pharyngitis.
follow_up.rationale: Reviewed for recovery-course context; fixed or diagnosis-specific timing was not added beyond existing exact wording.
follow_up.evidence_extract: States the adult and paediatric scope and expected recovery or reassessment context for viral and GAS pharyngitis.
